payload.description: Launched by the MTA in fall of 2021 to address the issue of track intrusion
Program including surge of NYPD and MTAPD presence, continued rollout of cameras and AI technology, and social-service outreach in high-traffic stations
LIRR installed at 26 stations; NYCT and Metro-North pilots this year
Pilot installed to test barriers to help customers feel safe
Pilot to use AI to make existing cameras more effective
Successful proof of concept in 2022; now piloting bigger-scale implementation
Procurement to begin this year
Round of stations awarded in 2022; next round in development
RFQ released last fall; RFP to be released this spring
MTA launched a Track Trespassing Task Force to address the issue of track intrusion

tool_args.label: NYC teen killed subway surfing on Williamsburg Bridge

payload.description: A 15-year-old boy died while subway surfing on a northbound J train crossing the Williamsburg Bridge at around 6:45 p.m., slamming his head on a part of the structure, falling beneath the train
